name: nepal-news-bot
description: Nepal news scraper and Facebook poster with robust deduplication

scripts.scrape: cd scraper_repo && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python scrape.py
scripts.db:stats: node -e "const Database = require('better-sqlite3'); const db = new Database('./dedup.db'); const result = db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN posted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as posted FROM articles').get(); console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); db.close();"
